case_title: OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC VS. BOCANOVA, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANOVA, LLC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-13-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-11-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-20-2016
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,333.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANOVA, LLC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-13-2016 CONTINUED TO AUG-24-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: DISMISSAL (TRANSACTION ID # 59631607) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $525.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $38,928.40 (TRANSACTION ID # 59890523) AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANOVA, LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-04-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-24-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF JOHN LYSDAHL IN SUPPORT OF RE DEFAULT, CCP SECTION 585(A) AND WAIVER OF ATTORNEYS FEES. (TRANSACTION ID # 59890523) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOCANOVA, LLC $3,260.00 PRINCIPAL, $483.00 INTEREST, $525.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,268.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 59890523)

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 59875190) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANOVA, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 59890523) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 58666330) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC SERVED FEB-22-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANOVA, LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 59630759) AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANOVA, LLC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME (TRANSACTION ID # 59631607) FILED BY ATTORNEY BARTLETT, ROBERT SUMNER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-10-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
